wins: Strong fourth quarter and full year results with 40% net income increase
Exceeded revenue target with 5% growth ex divestitures
Fee revenue up 17% and improved efficiency ratio by 340 bps
Grew tangible book value per share by 4% and CET1 ratio above regulatory requirements
risks: Higher expenses in 2025 due to transformation and technology investments
Uncertainty around capital requirements and regulatory environment
Potential impact of lower interest rates on NII
Card late fee reduction and FX headwinds
Need to continue reducing stranded costs and legacy expenses
